commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch removes `sessions_spawn` payload redaction from agent transcript repair/replay paths, preserves signed-thinking turns only when matching tool results exist, and updates focused agent tests.

PR surface: Source -89, Tests -73. Total -162 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows `redactSessionsSpawnAcpArgs` rewrites `streamTo` and `resumeSessionId` to `__OPENCLAW_REDACTED__`, matching the linked report that legal `streamTo: "parent"` values can reach validation as the sentinel.
commands.review_followup: Continue normal maintainer review; ClawSweeper found no patch-correctness issue.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve sessions_spawn transcript payloads
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove `sessions_spawn` transcript payload redaction for attachments, `resumeSessionId`, and `streamTo`.
- Keep tool-call repair as shape normalization only; local transcripts remain trusted operator state per `SECURITY.md`.
- Preserve provider-owned signed-thinking turns only when real matching tool results exist, including displaced real results that pairing repair can move safely.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.test.ts src/agents/session-transcript-repair.attachments.test.ts src/agents/session-transcript-repair.test.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --prompt-file /tmp/autoreview-82203-context.md`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `sessions_spawn` tool-call payloads are no longer rewritten to `__OPENCLAW_REDACTED__`; signed-thinking replay still requires real matching tool results before preserving provider-owned turns.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on Node 24-compatible runtime with the product transcript repair helper imported from `src/agents/tool-call-id.ts`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran `node --import tsx --input-type=module` with an inline script importing `sanitizeToolCallIdsForCloudCodeAssist`, feeding a `sessions_spawn` signed-thinking tool call plus matching tool result, and printing the repaired payload.
Evidence after fix: terminal output from the product helper run:

```json
{
  "sameArray": true,
  "toolId": "toolu_live_payload_01",
  "streamTo": "discord:ops-room",
  "resumeSessionId": "sess-local-123",
  "attachmentPath": "/tmp/openclaw-proof.txt"
}
```

Observed result after fix: the runtime repair path returned the original transcript array and preserved `streamTo`, `resumeSessionId`, attachment path, and native tool id when the matching tool result was present.
What was not tested: full broad changed gate; focused local proof and autoreview were used for this narrow agents replay fix.
target.author: martingarramon
